Methodology Summary

Grayscale conversion, size normalization, CLAHE, optional denoising, Otsu/adaptive binarization, multi-orientation Gabor ridge enhancement, thinning, minutiae extraction (ending/bifurcation) with filtering, and one-to-one constrained matching by distance/angle/type. For partial-print verification, the query minutiae are searched with translation and small rotation inside the reference frame.
